title: Del Command
parameters: fileName	The path and name of the file(s) to delete. The filename should be specified with an extension.  See ChDisk for the details.
see_also:
Kill

Del Command Example

The following examples are done from the command window using the Del command:

>
				Del
 TEST.pts  'Deletes the point file from the
	  current directory.

>
				Del
			 c : TEST.PTS       'NG

		!! Error: 7213 The file specified by path does not exist.

		> Del ｃ：\TEST.PTS	        'OK
